reach_why: Extends continual learning into ontology shift and uninterpretable truths, but builds from existing drift, OOD, and auditability ideas.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links memory budgets, semantic staleness, ontology drift, and audit demands under fallible representation.
falsifiable_why: Testable by benchmarking multidimensional budgets under concept and ontology shift, though uninterpreted truths remain partly operationalized.
explanation: Continual learning must manage fallible, shifting representations under multidimensional resource and audit constraints.
